name: SYSPRO ERP API
what_it_does: SYSPRO REST API and web services for ERP platform focused on manufacturing and distribution. Enables AI agents to manage inventory and warehouse management operations, handle purchase order and procurement workflows, access production scheduling and work order management, retrieve financial accounting and general ledger data, manage customer order management and fulfillment, handle bill of materials and product configuration, access quality management and inspection data, retrieve supply chain planning data, manage multi-site and multi-currency operations, and integrate ERP data with MES, WMS, and e-commerce platforms.
use_cases: Managing inventory and production scheduling from manufacturing automation agents
Handling purchase orders and procurement from supply chain agents
Retrieving financial and accounting data from ERP integration agents
Integrating SYSPRO with WMS and e-commerce from distribution automation agents
not_for: Service-only businesses without manufacturing or distribution operations
Large enterprise ERP requiring SAP or Oracle scale
Retail POS without manufacturing and distribution ERP needs
best_when: A small-to-mid-size manufacturer or distributor using SYSPRO wants AI agents to automate inventory management, production scheduling, procurement, financial accounting, and supply chain integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: ERP financial data includes accounts payable, receivable, and general ledger — automated transactions affect financial records. Production scheduling automation must prevent costly manufacturing errors. Inventory adjustments affect financial reporting accuracy.

auth.notes: SYSPRO uses OAuth 2.0 and operator-based authentication for web services. REST API available via SYSPRO 8 and cloud. Developer portal with API documentation and sample code. Webhooks for business event notifications. Strong .NET and C# integration heritage.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — ERP subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and per-module subscription; cloud and on-premises options
pricing.notes: Cape Town, South Africa. Founded 1978. Mid-market ERP for manufacturing and distribution. Used by 15,000+ companies in 60+ countries. Strong in food and beverage, electronics, and automotive manufacturing. SYSPRO 8 is latest version with REST API. Competes with Epicor and Infor for mid-market manufacturing ERP.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per subscription tier; cloud and on-premises vary

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: ERP financial data — automated GL entries and AP/AR transactions affect financial records
On-premises and hybrid deployment options — API behavior may differ by deployment type
No public MCP server — REST API via SYSPRO 8 with developer portal
Operator-based authentication heritage — may require legacy auth configurations
Multi-site and multi-currency operations require careful currency and entity handling
South Africa origin — data residency options require verification for US/EU compliance requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Manufacturing ERP and financial data. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. Multi-region. Financial and production data sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Manufacturing ERP data. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. Multi-region. Financial and production sensitivity.
